title: Day 5 lesson 3 ( Video )What time you go to sleep
html:
Day 5 - Lesson 3

なんじに　ねます　= What time you go to sleep

ばしょ (Location): きょうしつ　= Classroom

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters):  がくせい　さんにん (three students)

New words in this lesson are:

なんじに (nanji ni) = what time

ねます (nemas) = to sleep

ごろ (goro) = about

きのう (kinou) = yesterday

はん (han) = half
